Initialising login role...
DRY RUN: migrations will *not* be pushed to the database.
Connecting to remote database...
Remote migration versions not found in local migrations directory.

Make sure your local git repo is up-to-date. If the error persists, try repairing the migration history table:
supabase migration repair --status reverted 20260120000733 20260428065438 20260428065502 20260429020937 20260429041355 20260430222449 20260501030618 20260501034258 20260502032056 20260503081400 20260503082253 20260503091353 20260503100452 20260503233325 20260504035901 20260504041203 20260504041645 20260504042112 20260504050311 20260504062527 20260504063225 20260504065412 20260504065427 20260504070050 20260504070822 20260504073949 20260504080631 20260504230340 20260504230355 20260504230405 20260504230408 20260504230415 20260504230444 20260504231950 20260504232646 20260504233940 20260504233943 20260505040729 20260505040816 20260505041125 20260505062342 20260505062349 20260505070253 20260505101731 20260505111407 20260505111937 20260505112321 20260505112824 20260505114113 20260508012055 20260508012102 20260508012111 20260508012120 20260508012209 20260508021906 20260508022003 20260508022057 20260508022408 20260508022433 20260508022522 20260508024405 20260508024517 20260508024543 20260508025622 20260508025655 20260508025722 20260508025758 20260508033308 20260508040253 20260508040640 20260508041358 20260508053428 20260508053525 20260508053711 20260508061219 20260508061232 20260508061305 20260508061447 20260508062110 20260508092910 20260508092940 20260508092948 20260508092955 20260508093013 20260508093034 20260508093038 20260508093053 20260508093057 20260508094153 20260508095704 20260510035347 20260510045333 20260510045404 20260510045415 20260510045444

And update local migrations to match remote database:
supabase db pull
